items.summary: Update the admin Students page (frontend/src/pages/admin/Students.tsx) to display all registered students fetched from the backend, showing each student's full details including name, email, contact info, enrolled course, and enrollment/payment status.

Add an 'Edit Student' capability in the admin Students page that allows admins to edit all fields for a student: name, email, contact info, enrollment status, and any other stored student fields. Changes must be persisted to the backend.

Update the admin ManageStudentSessions page (frontend/src/pages/admin/ManageStudentSessions.tsx) to allow admins to select any registered student from a dropdown and add sessions (date, time, Google Meet link, topic) that are stored and displayed exclusively on that specific student's dashboard. Existing backend session hooks (useSessions.ts) must be used.

Update the admin ManageStudentMaterials page (frontend/src/pages/admin/ManageStudentMaterials.tsx) to allow admins to select any registered student from a dropdown and add study materials (title, description, link/URL) that are stored and displayed exclusively on that specific student's dashboard. Existing backend materials hooks (useMaterials.ts) must be used.

Ensure the admin Dashboard overview page (frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx) correctly fetches and displays the recent students list and summary stats (total students, active, pending, payments) from the backend using existing React Query hooks.

Extend the backend (backend/main.mo) with an updateStudent function that allows admins to update any field of a registered student record (name, email, contact info, enrollment status, and any other stored fields). Restrict this function to admin-only access.
